gherkin:
When the user navigates to mlb.com/live-stream-games
Then the user lands on the Media Center
And the user sees **WATCH** is underlined in the Top Nav
And the user sees the MLB Stream Schedule displayed

summary: Media Center | Verify calendar date range
gherkin:
Given the user is logged in and on mlb.com/live-stream-games
When the user navigates the calendar through URL or date container 
Then the user can view up to end of the current season (EX:2026/11/02) 
And as far back as the prior 2 season (EX:2024/02/20)

Given a user is logged in to mlb.com/tv 
And the user initiated playback of VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE content from the Welcome Center (/tv)
Or the user initiated playback of VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE content from the Shows Page (/tv/shows)
And the user has the appropriate entitlements for their selected content (none for VOD or FLIVE, SUBSCRIBERVOD for SVOD or SLIVE)
When the user initiates any of the following actions:

Pause
Play
Fast Forward
Rewind
Volume Control
Closed Caption
Full Screen
Then the player should respond appropriately to each action

Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And has the SUBSCRIBER VOD entitlement 
When the user navigates to select any SVOD Video from the Homepage 
Then the user should be able to play SVOD Video successfully

Given a user logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user is not on the Shows page
When the user selects ""Shows"" in the navigation header
Then the ""TV/SHOWS"" page loads smoothly 
And the user sees a content in the Hero 
And the user sees some carousel displays as they scroll down

Given  a user is on the mlb.com/live-stream-games (Media Center)
And the calendar from the Games page is displayed
When the user selects the ""<"" or "">"" buttons in the calendar 
And selects a day in the month that has games
Or the user opens the calendar picker and selects the “Today” button
Then the appropriate month and year is displayed as the user presses the ""<"" or "">"" buttons
And the appropriate day with the appropriate games are displayed on the games page after the user selects a day

summary: Smoke | Games Player | Verify Closed Captions OFF
description:
*NOTE: Users can access the Feature Settings in the Games player by navigating to the Settings menu under the General tab OR using the settings button on the players scrubber bar*

[https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WSTE-426|https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WSTE-426|smart-link]
gherkin:
Given an entitled use is logged into mlb.com/tv
And closed captions are disabled in the Settings
When the user plays a game they are entitled to
Then the user gets successful playback 
And the closed captions do not display during video playback

description:
*PLEASE NOTE: Excluded Live Content*
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock etc
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has MLBALL and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements
When the user selects any out of market content for playback
Then the user receives successful playback of that content

Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
When the user hovers over "ACCOUNT" in the top nav
Then a dropdown menu should appear containing the following options:
Account Settings 
My Players & Teams
Manage Subscriptions
Email Newsletters
Log Out

summary: Smoke | Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio
description: This is valid for both Live and Archived games.
gherkin:
Given the user is entitled to multiple video feed and logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has selected a game with multiple feeds
When the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
And the user selects an alt audio feed
Then the alt audio feed that was selected is playing back
And the alt audio is in-sync with the video

Given an entitled user logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has initiated playback for a live or archive game 
When the user initiates any of the following actions:
|Pause 
|Play
|Rewind
|Fast Forward
|Volume Control
|Playback Quality
|Broadcast Options
|Full Screen
Then the player should respond appropriately to each action

description:
*NOTE: Excluded Live Content*
Games that do not involve the subscribed team (except FGOTD)
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock etc
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has MLBTV_STP_<team_tri_code> and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements (ex:MLBTV_STP_STL)
When the user selects any out of market content of their purchased team for playback (ex: Cardinals)
Then the user receives successful playback of the entitled content

summary: Smoke | Verify Archive Game Playback - Default
description: *NOTE* Users can access to the "Start from the beginning” feature in the Games player by navigating to the Settings menu under the General tab."
gherkin:
Given an entitled user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user setting are in default (OFF)
When a user selects an archived game for playback
Then playback starts at the beginning of the stream
And the duration of the game display right side of the scrubber bar
And all available data is visible to the user (this includes innings and final scores)

Given a user is on the mlb.com/live-stream-games (Media Center)
When the user enters a specific date in the url
Then the appropriate day with the appropriate games are displayed
NOTE: Format is yyyy/mm/dd
example: mlb.com/live-stream-games/2024/09/18

Given a free user is logged into mlb.com/tv
When the user selects any VOD, FLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day
Then the user successfully receives playback for the VOD, FLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day
And the user cannot playback any SVOD, SLIVE, or non-Free Game of the Day

description:
*NOTE:* Excluded Live Content
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
Games that do not involve the subscribed team

{panel:bgColor=#deebff}
*NOTE:* At Bat subscribers have the following entitlements: MLBN, MLBAUDIO, MiLB and SUBSCRIBERVOD
{panel}

This is the case for both Spring training and Regular season games.
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has MLBN, MLBAUDIO, MiLB and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements
When the user selects any game for playback
Then the user receives unsuccessful playback of video feeds
And the user recieves successful playback of audio only feeds
And they successfully receives playback for the MLBN, VOD, SVOD, FLIVE, SLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day

Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And has the MLBN entitlement
When the user selects a MLBN content for playback from the Homepage 
Then the MLBN content plays back successfully
And the playback should start from the LIVE point

Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user is entitled to multiple game 
And the user has selected a game 
When the user selects a different game that they are entitled to from the gameday scoreboard in the player
Then the newly selected video feed starts playing back

summary: Smoke | Archive Game Playback - Hide Spoilers ON
description: *NOTE* Users can access to the 'Hide Spoiler' feature in the Games player by navigating to the Settings menu under the General tab.
gherkin:
Given an entitled user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And the users "HideSpoilers" setting are set to ON
When the user selects an archived game for playback from Hero, games tile or Media Center 
Then playback starts at the beginning of the stream
And all available data is hidden from the user (this includes innings and final score)
And the data is revealed inning by inning as playback progresses

summary: Smoke | Verify Welcome Center Page Load (Home Page)
gherkin:
Given a user is logged into mlb.com/tv (any user)
And the user is not on the Welcome Center (Home page)
When the user selects "MLB.TV" in the navigation header
Then the "MLB.TV" page loads without issues
And the Hero section should display relevant content
And available carousels should be visible on the Home page

summary: Verify date calendar default to ST day
gherkin:
Given the user navigates to the Media Center
And its off season
When the user looks at the date container 
Then the user should see the default date displayed in the date container (February 20,2026)

summary: Smoke | Verify Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed
description: This is valid for both Live and Archived games.
gherkin:
Given the user is logged into mlb.com/tv with valid credentials
And the user is entitled to multiple video feeds
And the user has selected a game with multiple video feeds (ex: Home and Away Video feeds)
When the user selects the "Broadcast Options" button in the player
And the user clicks on the other available video feed 
Then the newly selected video feed starts playing back
And audio playback is updated to the TV audio of the newly selected video feed
And the scrubber is dismissed after 5 seconds

Given a user is logged into mlb.com/tv (any user)
When the user navigates down to select a VOD video
Then the user is able to play the VOD Video successfully

summary: Smoke | Games Player | Verify Closed Captions ON
description:
*NOTE: Users can access the Feature Settings in the Games player by navigating to the Settings menu under the General tab OR using the settings button on the players scrubber bar*
[https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WSTE-425|https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WSTE-425|smart-link]
gherkin:
Given an entitled  user is logged into mlb.com/tv
And closed captions are enabled in the Settings
When the user plays a game that they are entitled to 
Then the user gets successful playback
And closed captions are displayed during video playback
And the Closed Captions sync with the audio

Given the user is NOT logged in
And they attempt to go to mlb.com/tv
And the user is redirected to the Log In page (mlb.com/login)
Or the user clicks the Login button (located at the top-right corner of the mlb.com page, represented by a user/profile icon)
Or the user selects the login button from the subscription page (if they are redirected to subscribe)
When the user enters a valid "Email"
And the user clicks "Continue"
And  the user enters a valid "Password"
And  the user clicks the "Log In" button
Then the user is successfully logged in
And  the user is redirected back to the Welcome Center

**NOTE: users may be redirected to different pages after login depending on where they are attempting to gain access to.**
EX: selecting a game link would redirect a user back to that game after login

Given the user is already logged into mlb.com/tv
When the user hovers over the "ACCOUNT" button from the top nav
And the user clicks the "Log Out" option
Then the logout screen should display 
And the following message should appear "You have been logged out of MLB.com.You will be automatically redirected in 5 seconds"
And the user should be redirected to the "MLB.com | The Official Site of Major League Baseball" page
